title: Apply knowledge of plant physiology to horticultural practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply knowledge of plant physiology to horticultural practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research plant structures

pcs.text: Identify and categorise plant cell structures, the organisation of cells into primary tissues and plant structural features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and categorise plant cell structures, the organisation of cells into primary tissues and plant structural features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and categorise plant cell structures, the organisation of cells into primary tissues and plant structural features.

pcs.text: Determine the functions of plant cells, primary tissues and plant structural features and their relation to plant growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the functions of plant cells, primary tissues and plant structural features and their relation to plant growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the functions of plant cells, primary tissues and plant structural features and their relation to plant growth.

pcs.text: Explain the physiological processes of photosynthesis, cellular respiration, transpiration and translocation in plants, including their role in plant function
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain the physiological processes of photosynthesis, cellular respiration, transpiration and translocation in plants, including their role in plant function?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain the physiological processes of photosynthesis, cellular respiration, transpiration and translocation in plants, including their role in plant function.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Research plant structures

elements.title: Investigate plant growth responses to horticultural practices

pcs.text: Analyse physiological plant responses to physical and environmental conditions and the horticultural practices that may impact on plant functioning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse physiological plant responses to physical and environmental conditions and the horticultural practices that may impact on plant functioning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse physiological plant responses to physical and environmental conditions and the horticultural practices that may impact on plant functioning.

pcs.text: Examine the role of plant growth regulators on plant growth and function
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine the role of plant growth regulators on plant growth and function?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine the role of plant growth regulators on plant growth and function.

pcs.text: Evaluate information on plant growth responses and the addition of plant growth regulators, and the implications for horticultural practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate information on plant growth responses and the addition of plant growth regulators, and the implications for horticultural practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate information on plant growth responses and the addition of plant growth regulators, and the implications for horticultural practices.

pcs.text: Research and describe methods to manipulate the physical and environmental conditions to achieve desired plant growth responses in horticultural practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and describe methods to manipulate the physical and environmental conditions to achieve desired plant growth responses in horticultural practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and describe methods to manipulate the physical and environmental conditions to achieve desired plant growth responses in horticultural practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Investigate plant growth responses to horticultural practices

elements.title: Analyse plant reproduction for horticultural practices

pcs.text: Identify the physiological processes of asexual and sexual reproduction of plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the physiological processes of asexual and sexual reproduction of plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the physiological processes of asexual and sexual reproduction of plants.

pcs.text: Describe the methods of seed and propagule dispersal used by plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe the methods of seed and propagule dispersal used by plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe the methods of seed and propagule dispersal used by plants.

pcs.text: Research and evaluate plant reproduction information for a range of plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and evaluate plant reproduction information for a range of plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and evaluate plant reproduction information for a range of plants.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Analyse plant reproduction for horticultural practices
